en.training_kit: This cat has not yet begun their training.
en.training_app: This cat has not yet completed their training.

training_mentors.zero: This cat either did not have a mentor, or {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} mentor is unknown.

en.training_mentor_trait_influence: %{mentor} influenced {PRONOUN/m_c/object} to be more likely to %{influence}.
en.graduation_honor: When {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} became a Watcher, {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} {VERB/m_c/were/was} honored for {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} %{honor}.
en.graduation_early: {PRONOUN/m_c/poss/CAP} training progressed swiftly, allowing {PRONOUN/m_c/object} to become a Watcher at only %{age} moons old.
en.graduation_normal: {PRONOUN/m_c/subject/CAP} became a Watcher at %{age} moons old.
en.comment: Warden Echo history strings where m_c is included.
en.comment_two: Warden Echo history strings where m_c is not included.

leader_lives_left_df.zero: The Warden has no Echoes remaining and has been claimed by the Hollow.
leader_lives_left_df.one: The Warden has one Echo remaining.

leader_lives_left_sc.zero: The Warden has no Echoes remaining and has passed beyond the Veil.
leader_lives_left_sc.one: The Warden has one Echo remaining.

en.scar_from_injury: m_c was scarred from an injury (%{injury_name}).
